title: Social Security Act 2018 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand's primary legislation governing social security assistance, benefits, and welfare obligations. Administered by the Ministry of Social Development, it establishes eligibility criteria, payment rates, and beneficiary obligations across multiple assistance types including jobseeker support, sole parent support, disability allowances, and emergency benefits.
